_comment: TEST FIXTURE — valid positive plan capture for review_captures.py tests.
goal: Write a Python script that reads a JSON file and prints each key-value pair on a separate line.

plan.plan: Single CODER task: read JSON with stdlib, print key-value pairs.

tasks.title: Write json_reader.py
tasks.description: Create json_reader.py. Accept input path via sys.argv[1]. Use json.load() to parse the file. Iterate over dict.items() and print each key and value as 'key: value'. Add a usage message if no argument is provided and exit with code 1.

notes: Test fixture — valid positive capture. Do not use for actual training.
